methods.name: Sedimentation
methods.description: Letting heavy particles settle at the bottom of the water
steps: Wait for particles to settle at the bottom
Carefully pour off the clean water from the top

methods.name: Filtration
methods.description: Using sand and charcoal filters to remove impurities
steps: Pour water through a filter made of sand and charcoal
Impurities get trapped in the filter
Clean water collects in the container below

methods.name: Disinfection
methods.description: Killing bacteria and viruses with UV light or chlorine
steps: Expose water to UV light or add chlorine

methods.name: Distillation
methods.description: Boiling water and condensing the steam to purify it
steps: Boil the water to create steam
Steam rises and leaves contaminants behind
Steam condenses back into pure water
